feed.title: Hosted Private Cloud Status - Incident History

entry.title: [RBX1A][Managed vSphere] - Equipment Update Notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Apr 30, 06:30 - 21:00 UTC

Apr 16, 15:38 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Managed vSphere offer.

Start time : 30/04/2026 06:30 UTC
End time : 30/04/2026 21:00 UTC
Service impact : No impact on vSphere UI, data availability and virtual machines.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we are rolling out an update for multiple storage servers.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [LIM][Hosted Private Cloud] - Rack L111A16
entry.content:
Apr 13, 15:58 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Hosted Private Cloud has been resolved.

Start time : 13/04/2026 12:28 UTC
End time : 13/04/2026 15:57 UTC
Root Cause : A service disruption occurred due to an unexpected underlying infrastructure malfunction.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Apr 13, 12:44 UTC
Investigating - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Backup as a Service offer on the specific Rack L111A16.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 13/04/2026 12:28 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Some hosts in rack L111A16 were temporarily unavailable
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access their host located on the specified racks
Root Cause : A service disruption occurred due to an unexpected underlying infrastructure malfunction.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

entry.title: [EU/CA][Managed VMware vSphere] - VMware NSX maintenance notification
entry.content:
Apr 13, 08:00 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Mar 27, 05:26 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Managed VMware vSphere offer in EU/CA regions.

Start time : 13/04/2026 08:00 UTC
End time : 16/04/2026 16:00 UTC
Service impact : Some customers may experience authentication failures on NSX during the maintenance window.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our Managed VMware vSphere offer.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [RBX2B/BHS1A/LIM1C/RBX2D][Managed vSphere] - Storage maintenance notification
entry.content:
Apr 7, 21:00 UTC
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Apr 7, 06:30 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Mar 19, 21:25 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Managed vSphere offer in RBX2B/BHS1A/LIM1C/RBX2D regions.

Start time : 07/04/2026 06:30 UTC
End time : 07/04/2026 21:00 UTC
Service impact : There will be no impact on the vSphere UI, data availability, or virtual machines during the maintenance.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we are rolling out an update for multiple storage servers.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [EU/CA][Hosted Private Cloud] - vRealize Operations (vRops) maintenance notification
entry.content:
Apr 2, 20:16 UTC
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Mar 30, 07:00 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Mar 10, 22:33 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on Managed vSphere offer.
This may temporarily affect availability.

Start time : 30/03/2026 07:00 UTC
End time : 02/04/2026 19:00 UTC
Service impact : vRops will be unavailable during the maintenance.
Service improvement : Following our continuous improvement policy, we are rolling out an upgrade for vRealize Operations (vRops).

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [RBX2][Hosted Private Cloud] - Multiple hosts migration notification
entry.content:
Apr 2, 03:12 UTC
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Apr 1, 20:00 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jan 13, 21:30 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Hosted Private Cloud offer, affecting hosts in racks 31A12, 31A13, 31A14 and 31A15.

Start time : 01/04/2026 20:00 UTC
End time : 02/04/2026 05:00 UTC
Service impact : Hosts located in the specified racks will be temporarily unavailable during the maintenance for 8 hours maximum.
Service improvement : Following our continuous improvement policy of our infrastructure, we will migrate Hosted Private Cloud hosts in the specified racks from RBX2 datacenter to RBX7 datacenter.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [EU/CA][Hosted Private Cloud] - Managed VMware vSphere maintenance notification
entry.content:
Mar 26, 15:16 UTC
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Mar 23, 08:00 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Feb 10, 22:22 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Managed VMware vSphere offer.

Start time : 23/03/2026 08:00 UTC
End time : 26/03/2026 17:00 UTC
Service impact : Hosts will be put in maintenance mode during the operation and a vMotion will be performed if it has Virtual machines in it.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our Managed VMware vSphere offer.

An individual communication will be done to inform customers.
Customers can reschedule the operation through the manager.

Thank you for your understanding

entry.title: [EU/CA][Hosted Private Cloud] - vRealize Operations (vRops) maintenance notification
entry.content:
Mar 26, 15:15 UTC
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Mar 23, 08:00 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Mar 10, 21:47 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on Managed vSphere offer.
This may temporarily affect availability.

Start time : 23/03/2026 08:00 UTC
End time : 26/03/2026 20:00 UTC
Service impact : vRops will be unavailable during the maintenance.
Service improvement : Following our continuous improvement policy, we are rolling out an upgrade for vRealize Operations (vRops).

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [EU][Managed VMware vSphere] - Login incident notification
entry.content:
Mar 22, 20:54 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Managed VMware vSphere has been resolved.

Start time : 22/03/2026 00:18 UTC
End time : 22/03/2026 20:51 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a software issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Mar 22, 19:56 UTC
Update - We have new information regarding the incident that affected your service(s).

Please find below an update on the situation:
Update : Our teams are still working on recovering the impacted services.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Mar 22, 18:10 UTC
Update - We have new information regarding the incident that affected your service(s).

Please find below an update on the situation:
Update : A fix has been implemented by our teams.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are currently recovering impacted services.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Mar 22, 16:36 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Managed VMware vSphere offer on the specific region EU.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 22/03/2026 00:18 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Some hosts are temporarily unreachable using IAM (Identity and Access Management).
Customers Impact : Some customers are temporarily unable to login to their hosts via vSphere using IAM (Identity and Access Management).
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a software issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

entry.title: [EU/CA][Hosted Private Cloud] - Managed VMware vSphere maintenance notification
entry.content:
Mar 19, 17:17 UTC
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Mar 16, 08:00 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Feb 10, 22:13 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Managed VMware vSphere offer.

Start time : 16/03/2026 08:00 UTC
End time : 19/03/2026 17:00 UTC
Service impact : Hosts will be put in maintenance mode during the operation and a vMotion will be performed if it has Virtual machines in it.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our Managed VMware vSphere offer.

An individual communication will be done to inform customers.
Customers can reschedule the operation through the manager.

Thank you for your understanding

entry.title: [RBX/SBG][Managed VMware vSphere] - VMware NSX Maintenance Notification

Mar 18, 08:00 UTC

Mar 10, 16:21 UTC

Start time : 18/03/2026 08:00 UTC
End time : 19/03/2026 17:00 UTC
Service impact : None expected, only vMotion of different VMs from one edge to another.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we are rolling out an update for our VMware NSX service.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [EU/CA][Backup as a Service] - Zerto maintenance notification
entry.content:
Mar 12, 17:47 UTC
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Mar 9, 08:00 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Feb 10, 21:25 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Backup as a Service offer.

Start time : 09/03/2026 08:00 UTC
End time : 12/03/2026 17:00 UTC
Service impact : During the maintenance window, the synchronization between the primary and secondary sites will be interrupted. As a result, the customer will not be able to activate the Disaster Recovery service.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our Backup as a Service offer.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [SBG][Managed VMware vSphere] - Rack SBG0502A07A incident notification
entry.content:
Mar 9, 13:53 UTC
Resolved - We would like to inform you that we had an incident on our Managed VMware vSphere offer in the rack SBG0502A07A.
This incident has now been resolved.

Here is detail for this incident :
Start time : 09/03/2026 08:12 UTC
End time : 09/03/2026 08:25 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Some hosts in the rack SBG0502A07A were temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Some customers were temporarily unable to access their hosts located on the specified rack.
Root Cause : This incident was caused by an electrical equipment issue.

We thank you for your understanding and patience throughout this incident.

entry.title: [SBG5][Cooling System] - Rack SBG0504A03B maintenance notification
entry.content:
Mar 7, 05:23 UTC
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Mar 5, 15:58 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Mar 5, 15:57 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our Hosted Private Cloud cooling infrastructure in SBG0504A03B.

Start time : 05/03/2026 15:24 UTC
End time : 06/03/2026 16:24 UTC
Service impact : The cooling system's efficiency could be temporarily impacted for some servers, which could cause a decreased performance during this maintenance.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.
